notes: NI Session Horns Pro — studio brass ensemble in Kontakt. CC 11 (Expression) is the primary real-time dynamics controller. CC 1 (Modulation) adds vibrato depth. The instrument uses 8 Quick Controls for ensemble, mic, and performance parameters. Articulations are triggered via key switches (default: C1–B1 range — check instrument's KS panel). Ensemble player count affects tone weight as well as width.

Expression.description: Expression — primary dynamics. Automate for natural horn swells and breaths. The most important CC for realistic brass.

Modulation.description: Vibrato depth — add gradually after the attack for natural brass vibrato

Quick Control 1.description: Ensemble Size — number of players; higher = thicker, heavier tone

Quick Control 2.description: Close Mic Level — direct mic, more definition and attack transient

Quick Control 3.description: Room Mic Level — hall ambience, more blend and space

Quick Control 5.description: Attack Speed — how quickly notes speak; lower = softer falls, higher = punchy sforzando

Quick Control 6.description: Release Time — note tail length after key-up

Quick Control 7.description: Vibrato Rate — speed of automatic vibrato cycle

Quick Control 8.description: Humanise — random timing and tuning variation between players

Growl.description: Growl / flutter-tongue intensity (if mapped in instrument KS panel)
